ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "institution_type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., university, research institute) */,
  "institution_address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "institution_city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "institution_state" TEXT /* State where the institution is located */,
  "institution_country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  "institution_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_types" (
  "publication_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication type */,
  "publication_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication type (e.g., Journal Article, Conference Paper) */,
  "publication_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the publication type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution where the publication was produced */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the publication */,
  "journal_full_title" TEXT /* Full title of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "issn_print" TEXT /* Print ISSN of the journal */,
  "issn_electronic" TEXT /* Electronic ISSN of the journal */,
  "issn_l" TEXT /* Linking ISSN of the journal */,
  "license_ref" TEXT /* License reference of the publication */,
  "indexed_in_crossref" INTEGER /* Whether the publication is indexed in Crossref */,
  "pmid" INTEGER /* PubMed ID of the publication */,
  "pmcid" TEXT /* PubMed Central ID of the publication */,
  "ut" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the publication in the database */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the publication */,
  "doaj" INTEGER /* Whether the publication is listed in the Directory of Open Access Journals (DOAJ) */,
  "publication_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication type */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Pages of the publication */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the publication */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Citation count of the publication */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Download count of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_publication_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_type_id") REFERENCES publication_types ("publication_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the author is associated with */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "author_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., department, institution) */,
  "author_email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "author_orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_agencies" (
  "funding_agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding agency */,
  "funding_agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "funding_agency_acronym" TEXT /* Acronym of the funding agency */,
  "funding_agency_country" TEXT /* Country where the funding agency is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_funding" (
  "publication_funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the funding is associated with */,
  "funding_agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding agency that provided the funding */,
  "grant_id" TEXT /* Grant ID of the funding */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "funding_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the funding amount */,
  "funding_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding period */,
  "funding_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_funding_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_funding_funding_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_agency_id") REFERENCES funding_agencies ("funding_agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  "issn_print" TEXT /* Print ISSN of the journal */,
  "issn_electronic" TEXT /* Electronic ISSN of the journal */,
  "issn_l" TEXT /* Linking ISSN of the journal */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher */,
  "journal_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the journal */,
  "journal_impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "publisher_address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "publisher_city" TEXT /* City where the publisher is located */,
  "publisher_state" TEXT /* State where the publisher is located */,
  "publisher_country" TEXT /* Country where the publisher is located */,
  "publisher_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL of the license */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of the license (e.g., Creative Commons, Open Access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the file is associated with */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_files_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the URL is associated with */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL */,
  "url_type" TEXT /* Type of the URL (e.g., DOI, PubMed, arXiv) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_urls_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., citation count, download count) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_metrics_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the department belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_departments" (
  "publication_department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each departmental affiliation */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the department is associated with */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_departments_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_departments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_research_areas" (
  "publication_research_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research area association */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the research area is associated with */,
  "research_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the research area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_research_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_research_areas_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_keywords" (
  "publication_keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword association */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the keyword is associated with */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_keywords_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)
